free_text: Production of 47Sc in photonuclear reactions  on natTi
targets  at the bremsstrahlung endpoint energy  of 30
Natural Ti target (purity - 99.9%) pressed in a tablet
and wrapped in a thin (15 micron) aluminium foil with
thickness 4.8 mm and 2.5 mm for the irradiations at 30
Identification  of  the  residual  nuclei  was
performed  by  their  half-lives  and the energies of
GEM15P4-70  with energy resolution  1.8 keV at 1332.5
keV g-ray peak of standard  60Co  g-source  and  0.82
keV at the 122 keV g-peak of standard 57Co g-source.
